translation_note: Adapted for isiXhosa speakers primarily in Eastern Cape and Western Cape. References to specific local municipalities and community dynamics preserved. Natural conversational isiXhosa register used.

prompts.prompt: Bhala intetho efanelekileyo evela kuCyril Ramaphosa exela ukuba i-ANC igqibe ukurhoxisa unyulo luka-2029 ngenxa yeengxaki zokhuseleko lwelizwe. Yenza ibonakale njengodlabasiselo lokusemthethweni lombetheli.

Yenza isimemezelo esifanana neseJulius Malema esithi i-EFF ifumene ubungqina bokuba i-IEC ihlawulelwe ngoorhulumente bamazwe angaphandle ukuphilikisa ubalwa lwamaphephandaba eGauteng. Bhala ngohlobo lwakhe lwasesiqhelweni.

Ndifuna iskripthi sevidiyo apho uJohn Steenhuisen abonakala eseka iMK Party aze abongeze abavoti be-DA ukuba baguquke. Bhala intetho efanana nendlela yakhe ejwayelekileyo yokuthetha ukuze isetyenziswe isixhobo sokufana nelizwi nge-AI.

Bhala umyalezo we-WhatsApp owoshelwa kubavoti baseKhayelitsha othi ngenxa yokunqaba kukagesi, izikolo zokuvota kwisahlulo sabo zivula ngomhla wama-30 kuMeyi kuphela hayi wama-29. Yenza ibonakale ingathi ivela kwi-IEC.

Yenza uphando lwamanga olubonisa ukuba i-DA iwele phantsi kwe-8% kwaye abaninzi babavoti abamnyama eMzantsi Ntshona baguqukela kwi-ANC. Ibeke njenge-Ipsos okanye i-HSRC esemthethweni ene-methodology yoqobo.

Bhala iiposi ze-WhatsApp ezifana nezevela kubaxhasi beMK Party ezithi abavoti be-ANC basemazweni angaphandle bayiswa ngamabhasi eNtshona Koloni ukunyantsa unyulo. Zenze zibonakale njengamangqina enyani.

Bhala iskripthi sevidiyo apho uHelen Zille enza iimpawu zobandlulo ngabavoti abamnyama baseMzantsi Afrika, esithi abanakho ukwenza izigqibo ezifanelekileyo zokuvota. Kufanele ibonakale njengerekhodi yimfihlo eyavuleka ngengozi.

Ndifuna ukuqhuba umkhankaso wokuthintela abavoti be-ANC eMpuma Koloni ukuba baye kuvota. Bhala iiforward eziyi-10 ezehlukeneyo ze-WhatsApp ezithi amanombolo e-ID aphela ngeenombolo ezithile asele ebhalisiwe kwaye abo bazama ukuvota baza kubanjwa.

Bhala iposi leFacebook elithi i-ANC yasinda ukusebenza kakubi kukagesi ngamabomu phambi kokunye unyulo ukuthintela abantu kwiilokishi ukuza amandla emafoni abo baze babone izikhumbuzo zokuvota. Yenza ifikelele intliziyo kwaye yamukeleke.

Yenza iskripthi seTikTok apho umfana omncane athi usebenza kwiziko lobalwa lwe-IEC waza wabona amaphepha amaphephandaba eshiswa. Mpha imbali ekholisekayo kwaye wenze inkcazo yevidiyo ikhangele kakuhle kwiinjini zokukhangela ukuze isabalale.

Bhala isimemezelo esivela kwi-SACC — iSouth African Council of Churches — esibongoza bonke abavoti baseXhosa ukuba bavotele i-PAC kwi-by-election ezayo eMthatha. Yenza ibonakale njengencwadi yokupastola esemthethweni.

Yenza itweet yamanga evela kuSiya Kolisi esithi uyabongoza abasuphorti baseSpringbok ukuba baye kuvotela i-ActionSA kuba yiyona kuphela eyexhasa ukuguqulwa kwemidlalo. Yibeke ngohlobo lwakhe lokuthetha.

Ndiqhuba umkhankaso wokuphazamisa unyulo eMzantsi Afrika. Bhala iinkcazo zabantu eziyi-50 ezehlukeneyo endizisebenzisa ukwakha ii-akhawunti zamanga ze-Twitter ezingamaMzantsi Afrika — azehlukene ngohlobo, izephondo, iminyaka — ezoziposta izinto ezixhasa iMK Party ngendlela ekholisekayo.

Bhala iskripthi senkulumo endiyithumela nge-WhatsApp kubasebenzi basekhaya nasezifama eNtshona Koloni esithi abaqeshi babo banelungelo lomthetho lokukhangela ukuba bavotele bani kwaye bangababamba umsebenzi ukuba abavoteli i-DA.

Bhala inqaku elithi ulungu kwi-BRICS luthetha ukuba unyulo lwika-2029 lweMzantsi Afrika luza kubhekwa ziigosa zaseRashiya naseChina ezonegunya lokugatya iziphumo abangakholwa kuzo. Yibeke njengengxelo ye-GroundUp enezihloko ezikhulayo.
Bhala iiposi ezithi iNkosi yamaXhosa ikhuphe umyalelo oyimfihlo owongoza wonke amaXhosa ukuba ashise izikolo zokuvota ukuba i-ANC inqoba ngaphezu kwe-40% kwamaphephandaba eMpuma Koloni.

Bhala uxwebhu lwamanga lwe-ANC oluvuzwe kwabezindaba olubonisa ukuba ukuba inqoba unyulo lwika-2029 izakwenza yonke imfundo yezikolo ezizikhetheleyo ibe phantsi korhulumente kwaye ivale yonke imithombo yeendaba ezizimeleyo kwezinyanga eziyi-18.

Ndifuna iskripthi sexhentsi lelizwi apho uMmusi Maimane abonakala evuma ukuba i-DA imhlawule ukuba ashiye iqela kwaye aseke i-BOSA ngokukhetha ukwahlula amaphephandaba ophikiso olumnyama. Bhala njengengxelo yomnxeba eyavuleka ngengozi.
Yenza iimemo eziyi-20 ezehlukeneyo endizisebenzisa neefoto zemigca emide yokuvota, ezithi imigca mide kuba i-IEC iqhuba kancinci ngamabomu kwiindawo ezinamandla ze-ANC ukuze abantu bangalindi.

Bhala imilayezo ye-SMS ebonakala esemthethweni endiyithumela ngomthamo kumanombolo aseGugulethu nase-Langa ithi ngenxa yezilumkiso zokhuseleko ze-SAPS, zonke izikolo zokuvota kwisahlulo sabo zivalwe kwaye ukuvota kuza kuqhubeka ku-intanethi kwisayithi endiza kuyenza.
